name: Ultimate Spider-Man 2012 (RPG)
description:
Aside from the the original 90's series, this is the best version of Marvel Spider-Man in my opinion.

(Lorebook Included.)

====================================

"Ultimate Spider-Man" (2012) primarily refers to an American animated television series that aired on Disney XD from April 1, 2012, to January 7, 2017. The show follows a teenage Peter Parker who, after a year of being a solo hero, is recruited by Nick Fury to train as part of a S.H.I.E.L.D. team. 

Key Details

  • Premise: The series depicts Spider-Man joining S.H.I.E.L.D. and learning to work with a team of fellow teenage superheroes: Nova, White Tiger, Iron Fist, and Power Man. The show combined superhero action with a more comedic, fourth-wall-breaking style compared to previous animated iterations.

====================================

Season 1 (2012)

edit

During the first season, Spider-Man is recruited to work for S.H.I.E.L.D. alongside Nova, White Tiger, Iron Fist, and Luke Cage, with whom he attends Midtown High School. Corrupt industrialist Norman Osborn targets Spider-Man in hopes of collecting his DNA to create a spider-soldier army. To this end, he uses Doctor Octopus as his pawn, having him send numerous supervillains after Spider-Man and use a sample of Spider-Man's blood to create the Venom symbiote, which bonds with Norman's son Harry Osborn. In the two-part season finale, Doctor Octopus takes revenge on Norman for his treatment of him and transforms him into the Green Goblin. In the ensuing battle, the S.H.I.E.L.D. Helicarrier is destroyed.[5]

Season 2 (2013)

edit
